## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally and stays **offline** (`ATLAS_FORCE_OFFLINE=1`)
- [ ] No per-user state or secrets committed (`settings.json`, `registry.json`,
      `memory/vault/people/owner.md`, episodic transcripts, voice models, API keys)
- [ ] Code matches the surrounding style (naming, comments, idiom)
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under **AGPL-3.0-or-later** and may also
      be licensed commercially by the maintainer (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
